title: ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Tools Kit
description:
Take your gold hunting to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Kit—a complete, ready-to-go setup built for serious prospectors and ambitious beginners alike. Designed for portability and performance, this all-in-one kit gives you the tools you need to dig, sift, separate, and collect gold efficiently in the field.

ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Tools Kit
Take your gold hunting to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Kit - a complete, ready-to-go setup built for serious prospectors and ambitious beginners alike. Designed for portability and performance, this all-in-one kit gives you the tools you need to dig, sift, separate, and collect gold efficiently in the field.
Key Features
  • COMPLETE 21PC GOLD PROSPECTING KIT - All-in-one set includes sluice box, gold pans, shovel, scoop, magnet tool, snifter bottle, loupe, and 12 collection vials for a full gold recovery workflow.
  • 32” LIGHTWEIGHT SLUICE BOX WITH RIFFLES - Durable ABS construction with multiple riffles designed to trap fine gold while allowing lighter sediment to wash away efficiently.
  • 3 DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS (8”, 10”, 12”) - Process material in stages with three sizes for improved gold separation and recovery in any prospecting environment.
  • DIG, COLLECT & SEPARATE WITH EASE - Includes 23" tri-fold steel shovel and 12.5" high-visibility scoop for efficient digging and material collection in the field.
  • PRECISION GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - 8lb black sand magnet removes unwanted material, while the snifter bottle, 10x loupe, and 12 vials help collect, inspect, and store your gold.
Specifications
MPN: ASR-TJMB75-90MF
UPC: 810131703141
Number of Pieces: 21
Brand: ASR Outdoor
Color: Assorted
Take your gold hunting to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Kit—a complete, ready-to-go setup built for serious prospectors and ambitious beginners alike. Designed for portability and performance, this all-in-one kit gives you the tools you need to dig, sift, separate, and collect gold efficiently in the field.

At the heart of the kit is a 32" lightweight ABS plastic sluice box, engineered with multiple riffles to help trap fine gold while allowing lighter materials to wash away. Pair it with the included 8", 10", and 12" dual riffle gold pans to process material at every stage - from rough sorting to fine gold recovery.

The 23" tri-fold steel shovel and 12.5" high-visibility orange scoop make collecting paydirt fast and efficient, whether you're working riverbanks, creeks, or gravel beds. Once you’ve concentrated your material, the 8lb magnetic black sand pickup tool helps remove unwanted magnetic sands with ease, improving visibility and gold recovery.

For precision work, the kit includes a 3oz snifter bottle to capture fine gold flakes and a 10x magnification loupe to inspect your finds up close. Store your discoveries securely with 12 included 3/4 dram collection vials, perfect for organizing and transporting your gold.

Lightweight, compact, and field-ready, this kit is ideal for gold panning, sluicing, creek prospecting, and outdoor adventures. Whether you're chasing your first flakes or expanding your setup, the ASR Outdoor 21pc Kit delivers everything you need in one powerful bundle.
